$schema_note: Structured humor-taste calibration. Single source consumed by the comedy-craft skill (personal stack) AND by PropertyIQ's AgentTasteProfile as the pilot-tenant fixture. Update HERE; prose in comedy-craft/SKILL.md describes, this file defines. Created 2026-07-01 from the calibration locked 2026-06-26/27.
write_rules: Lead with the twist; economy over warmth
Deadpan it: state the absurd thing flatly, no lol, no winking, no exclamation points
One strong line beats a paragraph of setup
A little surreal is welcome when internally logical
Mine dark comedians for STRUCTURE never content

edge_calibration.owner_words: A little bit of edge is okay, but nothing that's going to offend people because we still have a business to run. You're okay offending me, but for clients and the kind of stuff we're doing, don't push it too far. I'm okay pushing just a little bit.
edge_calibration.rule_when_unsure: dial the content back and let the construction (twist, economy) carry the funny

process_invariants: generate many, cut hard, present 3-5 options, the human picks the live one
anchor on concrete examples before writing (references/humor-reference.md + Obsidian/Humor/distilled/)
nail ONE funny core then derive platform variants; never be funny 16 times in parallel
run the screenshot test; a cut joke costs nothing, a bad joke costs the piece
humor runs before the humanizer pass, never after

propertyiq_mapping.consumed_by: AgentTasteProfile (PropCast Master Brain, cross-module schema) as the pilot-tenant fixture
propertyiq_mapping.onboarding_note: For new tenants, PropertyIQ builds this same file shape from their roster/edge answers during PropCast onboarding; the Gauntlet's taste scoring reads it
propertyiq_mapping.feedback_loop: picked/rejected/edited outcomes from approval cards should update this profile over time (Part 17 feedback events)
